segments.text: let the nations tremble; he sits enthroned between the cherubim, let the earth shake.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Great is the Lord in Zion; he is exalted over all the nations.
Let them praise your great and awesome name— he is holy.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The King is mighty, he loves justice—
you have established equity; in Jacob you have done what is just and right.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Exalt the Lord our God and worship at his footstool; he is holy.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Moses and Aaron were among his priests, Samuel was among those who called on his name;
they called on the Lord and he answered them.
segments.speaker: Moses, Aaron, and Samuel

segments.text: He spoke to them from the pillar of cloud;
they kept his statutes and the decrees he gave them.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Lord our God, you answered them; you were to Israel a forgiving God, though you punished their misdeeds.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Exalt the Lord our God and worship at his holy mountain, for the Lord our God is holy.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
